d: When Neelesh, an idealistic law student from a marginalised section of society, steps into an prestigious institution, he is thrust into a world that doesn`t reflect his own. His friendship with Vidhi, offers hope-until a wave of tragedy exposes the deep-rooted hierarchies he tried to outrun. He must confront the invisible forces that shape who we are allowed to become and who we love. A searing romantic drama about identity, power, and the cost of love in the world we live in.
